title: tephrocactus subterraneus
intro: Tephrocactus subterraneus, also known as the desert Christmas cactus, is a type of cactus that grows underground and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tephrocactus subterraneus include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating wounds, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made by infusing the roots or stems in water or oil, which can be used to create teas, salves, and tinctures.
